attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,'Direct Warranty'
,DIRECT_WARRANTY_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MAN_ADJ_FROM_REVENUE  NGLRM
WHERE NGLRM.DIRECT_WARRANTY_AMT <> 0.000000

SELECT
NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,'Variance/OCOGS'
,V_O_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MAN_ADJ_FROM_REVENUE  NGLRM
WHERE NGLRM.V_O_AMT <> 0.000000

SELECT
NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,'OVERHEAD'
,OVERHEAD_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MAN_ADJ_FROM_REVENUE NGLRM
WHERE NGLRM.OVERHEAD_AMT <> 0.000000

SELECT
NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,'Excess and Obsolete'
,E_O_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MAN_ADJ_FROM_REVENUE  NGLRM
WHERE NGLRM.E_O_AMT <> 0.000000

SELECT
NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,'Shipped Cost'
,SHIPPED_COST_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MAN_ADJ_FROM_REVENUE  NGLRM
WHERE NGLRM.SHIPPED_COST_AMT <> 0.000000

SELECT
NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,'Shipped Revenue'
,SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MAN_ADJ_FROM_REVENUE  NGLRM
WHERE NGLRM.SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT <> 0.000000

SELECT 
RFM.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE          
,RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
,RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT       
,BIZ_DATA_S.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY_TGT 
,WI.PRODUCT_KEY
,WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD
,CASE WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Shipped Revenue' THEN 'Shipped Revenue Manual Adjustments'
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Shipped Cost' THEN 'Shipped Cost Manual Adjustments'
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Excess and Obsolete' THEN 'E&O Manual Adjustment' 
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='OVERHEAD' THEN 'Overhead Manual Adjustment'
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Variance/OCOGS' THEN 'V&O Manual Adjustment'
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Direct Warranty' THEN 'Direct Warranty Manual Adjustment'
END SUBMEASURE_NAME
,'Restatement/Acct Movement' BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
,'CISCO CORE' BK_ADJUSTMENT_COMPANY_NAME    
,ISOC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME BK_RPRTD_ADJSTMNT_CNTRY_NAME  
,RSH_T.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE BK_ADJSTMNT_SLS_SUBCOVERGE_CD 
,ADJUSTMENT_AMT * PCT_CHANGE * (-1) * PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT ADJUSTMENT_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT
,WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,USER
,'I' ACTION_CODE
,'I' DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MAN_ADJ_FROM_REVENUE_BM WI
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BE_HIER_PRD_FAMILY_ALLOC  BEA
ON BEA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AND BEA.ITEM_KEY = WI.PRODUCT_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_RST_ACT_MVMNT_BIZ_DATA BIZ_DATA_S 
ON BIZ_DATA_S.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND BIZ_DATA_S.DD_EXT_THTR_NM_SRC = CASE WHEN BIZ_DATA_S.DD_EXT_THTR_NM_SRC = 'External Theater' THEN 'External Theater' ELSE RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME END
AND BIZ_DATA_S.L2_SALES_TRTRY_DESCR_SRC = RSH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR       
AND BIZ_DATA_S.SALES_CVRG_CODE_SRC = RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE                      
AND BIZ_DATA_S.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NM_SRC = BEA.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME     
/* AND BIZ_DATA_S.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD = WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD */
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH_T ON RSH_T.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BIZ_DATA_S.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY_TGT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISOC ON ISOC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = RSH_T.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT

SELECT 
RFM.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE          
,RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        
,RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT       
,BIZ_DATA_S.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY_SRC 
,WI.PRODUCT_KEY
,WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD
,CASE WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Shipped Revenue' THEN 'Shipped Revenue Manual Adjustments'
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Shipped Cost' THEN 'Shipped Cost Manual Adjustments'
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Excess and Obsolete' THEN 'E&O Manual Adjustment' 
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='OVERHEAD' THEN 'Overhead Manual Adjustment'
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Variance/OCOGS' THEN 'V&O Manual Adjustment'
WHEN WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD='Direct Warranty' THEN 'Direct Warranty Manual Adjustment'
END SUBMEASURE_NAME
,'Restatement/Acct Movement' BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
,'CISCO CORE' BK_ADJUSTMENT_COMPANY_NAME    
,ISOC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME BK_RPRTD_ADJSTMNT_CNTRY_NAME  
,RSH_S.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE BK_ADJSTMNT_SLS_SUBCOVERGE_CD 
,ADJUSTMENT_AMT * PCT_CHANGE * PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT ADJUSTMENT_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT
,WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,USER
,'I' ACTION_CODE
,'I' DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MAN_ADJ_FROM_REVENUE_BM WI
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BE_HIER_PRD_FAMILY_ALLOC  BEA
ON BEA.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT AND BEA.ITEM_KEY = WI.PRODUCT_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_RST_ACT_MVMNT_BIZ_DATA BIZ_DATA_S 
ON BIZ_DATA_S.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND BIZ_DATA_S.DD_EXT_THTR_NM_SRC = CASE WHEN BIZ_DATA_S.DD_EXT_THTR_NM_SRC = 'External Theater' THEN 'External Theater' ELSE RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME END
AND BIZ_DATA_S.L2_SALES_TRTRY_DESCR_SRC = RSH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR       
AND BIZ_DATA_S.SALES_CVRG_CODE_SRC = RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE                      
AND BIZ_DATA_S.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NM_SRC = BEA.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME     
/* AND BIZ_DATA_S.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD = WI.BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD */
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH_S ON RSH_S.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BIZ_DATA_S.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY_SRC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY ISOC ON ISOC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = RSH_S.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT

SELECT 
BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD         
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT        
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT       
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,PRODUCT_KEY                   
,BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD 
,BK_ADJ_SUB_MEASURE_TYPE_CD    
,BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,BK_ADJUSTMENT_COMPANY_NAME    
,BK_RPRTD_ADJSTMNT_CNTRY_NAME  
,BK_ADJSTMNT_SLS_SUBCOVERGE_CD 
,SUM(ADJUSTMENT_ALLOCATION_USD_AMT )
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)             
,USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)            
,USER               
,'I' ACTION_CODE                   
,'I' DML_TYPE                      
FROM $$STGDB.WI_PRDT_REV_CST_ADJ_ALCTN 
GROUP BY 
BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD         
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT        
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT       
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,PRODUCT_KEY                   
,BK_ADJUSTMENT_MEASURE_TYPE_CD 
,BK_ADJ_SUB_MEASURE_TYPE_CD    
,BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,BK_ADJUSTMENT_COMPANY_NAME    
,BK_RPRTD_ADJSTMNT_CNTRY_NAME  
,BK_ADJSTMNT_SLS_SUBCOVERGE_CD 
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT

SELECT
NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT)) SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,SUM((CASE WHEN NGLRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','SLS_ADJ') AND NGLRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = 'POS ALLOCATION' THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT WHEN NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' AND ADJ_TYPE.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN ('NMS' , 'WARRANTY') THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT WHEN (NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND NGLRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ') OR NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T' THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END))    SHIPPED_COST_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID IN ('Direct Inventory Provision', 'Indirect Inventory Provision', 'Inventory Provision', 'Excess and Obsolete') THEN  NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END)) E_O_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID IN ('Direct Mfg Overhead', 'Indirect Mfg Overhead', 'Overhead') THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END))  OVERHEAD_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID IN ('Direct Variance/OCOGS', 'Indirect Variance/OCOGS', 'Variance/OCOGS', 'Variance OCOGS') THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END))  V_O_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID = 'Direct Warranty' THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END))  DIRECT_WARRANTY_AMT
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NGLRM,
$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DIRECT_INDIRECT_ADJ_TYPE ADJ_TYPE,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RPF,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH,
( SELECT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.ST_RST_ACT_MVMNT_BIZ_DATA GROUP BY 1 )  RFM
WHERE ( NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY=RPF.ITEM_KEY  )
AND  ( NGLRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD=ADJ_TYPE.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD AND NGLRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD=ADJ_TYPE.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD AND NGLRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD=ADJ_TYPE.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD  )
AND ( NGLRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y'  OR ADJ_TYPE.DUAL_GAAP_FLG = 'Y' ) /* ADDED DUAL_GAP OR CONDN AS PART OF NRS PI3 */  
AND RPF.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <> 'SERVICE'  
AND RPF.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID  NOT IN  ( 'SERVICE','TOTAL_CISCO','TBA','MISC'  ) 
AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ'  /* ADDED AS PART OF NRS PI3 */ 
AND RFM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
GROUP BY 1 , 2 , 3

 /* ADDED UNION AS PART OF NRS PI3 */ 
UNION ALL

SELECT
NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT)) SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
,SUM((CASE WHEN NGLRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('POS','SLS_ADJ') AND NGLRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = 'POS ALLOCATION' THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT WHEN NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' AND ADJ_TYPE.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN ('NMS' , 'WARRANTY') THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT WHEN (NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'AR' AND NGLRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ') OR NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T' THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END))    SHIPPED_COST_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID IN ('Direct Inventory Provision', 'Indirect Inventory Provision', 'Inventory Provision', 'Excess and Obsolete') THEN  NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END)) E_O_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID IN ('Direct Mfg Overhead', 'Indirect Mfg Overhead', 'Overhead') THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END))  OVERHEAD_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID IN ('Direct Variance/OCOGS', 'Indirect Variance/OCOGS', 'Variance/OCOGS', 'Variance OCOGS') THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END))  V_O_AMT
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(CASE WHEN ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID = 'Direct Warranty' THEN NGLRM.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT ELSE 0 END))  DIRECT_WARRANTY_AMT
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE NGLRM,
$$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DIRECT_INDIRECT_ADJ_TYPE ADJ_TYPE,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN RPF,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH,
( SELECT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.ST_RST_ACT_MVMNT_BIZ_DATA GROUP BY 1 )  RFM
WHERE ( NGLRM.PRODUCT_KEY=RPF.ITEM_KEY  )
AND  ( NGLRM.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD=ADJ_TYPE.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD AND NGLRM.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD=ADJ_TYPE.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD AND NGLRM.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD=ADJ_TYPE.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD  )
AND  ( NGLRM.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG='Y' )
AND RPF.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <> 'SERVICE'  
AND RPF.BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID  NOT IN  ( 'SERVICE','TOTAL_CISCO','TBA','MISC'  ) 
AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NGLRM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND NGLRM.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD NOT IN ( 'IND_ADJ' )
AND RFM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = NGLRM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
GROUP BY 1 , 2 , 3
